scripts_to_add.test:sparc:all: npm run test:sparc && npm run test:sparc:e2e
scripts_to_add.db:migrate: find src/database/migrations -name '*.sql' | sort | xargs -I {} psql -h localhost -U postgres -d agent_feed -f {}
scripts_to_add.sparc:validate: npm run test:sparc:all && echo '✅ SPARC methodology validation complete'
